parts.description: Pure, UI-free numeric core: value model, ops, parsing, integer expression evaluator, full-precision f64 evaluator (float mode), fixed-point. Carries all 43 unit tests.
eframe/egui immediate-mode desktop app over nybble-core. Glow (OpenGL) backend; x11 only (wayland dropped); int/float modes; persistence for theme/history-base/view-mode/number-mode/custom-size.

integration_points.details: nybble-core = { path = "../core" }; app.rs calls eval, eval_float, f64_to_value, fixed::to_real/from_real, Value methods. One-way dependency.
